form.formComment: Unbeaten in five starts. Resuming. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Lone Star Park September 13 over 366m, a 0.3 lengths behind Brother Gaga carrying 56kg at $1.80. At her first start favourite; won by 1.0 len this track May 8 over 320m defeating Rr Sweet Memories carrying 56kg at $10.40. Can go on with the job this prep.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Evangeline Downs November 22 over 366m, 2.5 len behind Tempting Grace with 57kg at $17.70. First up last campaign sixth of 8 at Evangeline Downs October 30 over 229m, 0.9 len behind Rogue Fast Dash carrying 57kg at $13.80. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at this track on March 8 over 320m, 1.4 len behind Go Sin Tacha Go carrying 56kg at $15. Second-up 2nd of 8 at this track on March 21 over 274m, 0.3 len behind Cd Favorite Aj with 56kg at $4.20. Finds a few better today. Can't recommend.
